title: 7 Herbal Teas For Dark Lips
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas contains glycyrrhizin, a triterpenoid saponin, which has anti-inflammatory properties. This helps to reduce redness and swelling in dark lips, making them appear lighter. The tea also contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant properties that protect the skin from damage. Glycyrrhizin also has a mild bleaching effect, which can help to lighten dark spots on the lips. Regular consumption of Glycyrrhiza glabra teas may help to even out lip colo...
